or email code

Create a SlimeWire profile with a saved username and password, or leave the fields blank for a quick web account.

Tap Enter or the video to continue.

Built for

Traders

Start Sliming

Track Solana pairs, wallet balances, live trades, and sniper tools from one swamp terminal.

Connect your wallet Connect Phantom or Solflare to start tracking trades.
After connecting, balances, open positions, watchlist, and PnL sync automatically.
Or lock in with your account
or email code
Already have an account? Use Lock In. We never ask for your seed phrase. Review wallet permissions before signing. Connect a wallet or create an account when you are ready to trade.

By signing in you agree to Slimeness (Terms) and Slime Policy (Privacy).
